item.title: Digital Camera Recovery Download [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Recovery Download [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydownload
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Recovery Download
(Utilities)
Free download Digital Camera Data Recovery software on your Windows PC from website www.datarecoverydownload.net which allows fully and completely rescue multiple files and folders such as images, audio, video clips from damaged removable storage media location. Application supports Windows operating system like XP, vista, 7 etc for better restoration of lost or missing pictures in original format without any change in system configuration.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Recovery Download
(Utilities)
Free download Digital Camera Data Recovery software on your Windows PC from website www.datarecoverydownload.net which allows fully and completely rescue multiple files and folders such as images, audio, video clips from damaged removable storage media location. Application supports Windows operating system like XP, vista, 7 etc for better restoration of lost or missing pictures in original format without any change in system configuration.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Camera Recovery Download
(Utilities)
Free download Digital Camera Data Recovery software on your Windows PC from website www.datarecoverydownload.net which allows fully and completely rescue multiple files and folders such as images, audio, video clips from damaged removable storage media location. Application supports Windows operating system like XP, vista, 7 etc for better restoration of lost or missing pictures in original format without any change in system configuration.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:author: vlyskouski
item.itunes:summary:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.description:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]

The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).

item.title: Data Recovery Download [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery Download [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydownload
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery Download
(Utilities)
Are you looking for software to undelete lost files? Use cost effective data salvage tool that has ability to revive completely deleted files from various storage devices like USB drive, memory card, HDD and more. Download comprehensive files revival utility that enables users to rescue missing memorable picture collection, text documents etc from virus infected digital storage devices. User friendly Data Recovery Download software offers interactive GUI interface to support novice users in salvage of favorite songs from formatted storage media.

[read more]

User friendly Data Recovery Download software offers interactive GUI interface to support novice users in salvage of favorite songs from formatted storage media.

item.content:encoded:
Data Recovery Download
(Utilities)
Are you looking for software to undelete lost files? Use cost effective data salvage tool that has ability to revive completely deleted files from various storage devices like USB drive, memory card, HDD and more. Download comprehensive files revival utility that enables users to rescue missing memorable picture collection, text documents etc from virus infected digital storage devices. User friendly Data Recovery Download software offers interactive GUI interface to support novice users in salvage of favorite songs from formatted storage media.

[read more]

item.title: Ping Monitor [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Ping Monitor [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
Ping Monitor
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
# Aurthor : revWhiteShadow
# Build Date : 19-12-2023
# Last Modify : Null
# Licence : GPL V3
[url=https://t.me/godTspeed] Telegram]
---
🚀 **PING MONITOR BY @revWhiteShadow** 🚀

---

👋 **Hello, Linux Enthusiasts!**

Are you curious about the performance of your network connection? Want a quick and colorful way to monitor your ping? Look no further! I present to you the **PING MONITOR** script, crafted by the talented @revWhiteShadow.

📝 **Usage Instructions:**

1. **Download the Script:**
- Clone or download the script from the repository.

2. **Set Permissions:**
- Make the script executable using the following command:
```
chmod +x pm
```

3. **Run the Script:**
- Execute the script using the following command:
```
./pm
```

4. **Enjoy the Colorful Output:**
- The script will perform 15 ping tests to google.com and display the results with colorful status indicators.

5. **Desktop Notifications:**
- Desktop notifications will keep you informed of the overall ping status and individual ping results.

6. **Customization (Optional):**
- Feel free to customize the script according to your preferences, adjust color codes, or modify the ping target.

7. **Stay Notified:**
- The script utilizes `notify-send` for desktop notifications, keeping you informed about the overall and individual ping statuses.

🌐 **Compatibility:**
- The script is designed for Linux environments and provides a quick and visual way to assess your network's responsiveness.

🎨 **Color Code Legend:**
- **Red:** Server not responding.
- **Green:** Super fast ping (less than 30ms).
- **Violet:** Moderate ping (30ms - 100ms).
- **Red:** High ping (100ms - 120ms).
- **Red:** Super high ping (more than 120ms).

🔄 **Repeat as Needed:**
- Feel free to run the script as often as you like to monitor changes in your network's performance.

🙏 **Acknowledgments:**
- Special thanks to @revWhiteShadow for the inspiration and guidance in creating this handy ping monitoring script.

🔗 **Repository Link:**
- [Ping Monitor Script](https://bestmagiskmodule.github.io/2023/12/19/Ping-Monitor-magical-module.html)

🔍 **Explore, Monitor, and Enjoy the Insights!**

---


[read more]
item.description:
Ping Monitor
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
# Aurthor : revWhiteShadow
# Build Date : 19-12-2023
# Last Modify : Null
# Licence : GPL V3
[url=https://t.me/godTspeed] Telegram]
---
🚀 **PING MONITOR BY @revWhiteShadow** 🚀

---

👋 **Hello, Linux Enthusiasts!**

Are you curious about the performance of your network connection? Want a quick and colorful way to monitor your ping? Look no further! I present to you the **PING MONITOR** script, crafted by the talented @revWhiteShadow.

📝 **Usage Instructions:**

1. **Download the Script:**
- Clone or download the script from the repository.

2. **Set Permissions:**
- Make the script executable using the following command:
```
chmod +x pm
```

3. **Run the Script:**
- Execute the script using the following command:
```
./pm
```

4. **Enjoy the Colorful Output:**
- The script will perform 15 ping tests to google.com and display the results with colorful status indicators.

5. **Desktop Notifications:**
- Desktop notifications will keep you informed of the overall ping status and individual ping results.

6. **Customization (Optional):**
- Feel free to customize the script according to your preferences, adjust color codes, or modify the ping target.

7. **Stay Notified:**
- The script utilizes `notify-send` for desktop notifications, keeping you informed about the overall and individual ping statuses.

🌐 **Compatibility:**
- The script is designed for Linux environments and provides a quick and visual way to assess your network's responsiveness.

🎨 **Color Code Legend:**
- **Red:** Server not responding.
- **Green:** Super fast ping (less than 30ms).
- **Violet:** Moderate ping (30ms - 100ms).
- **Red:** High ping (100ms - 120ms).
- **Red:** Super high ping (more than 120ms).

🔄 **Repeat as Needed:**
- Feel free to run the script as often as you like to monitor changes in your network's performance.

🙏 **Acknowledgments:**
- Special thanks to @revWhiteShadow for the inspiration and guidance in creating this handy ping monitoring script.

🔗 **Repository Link:**
- [Ping Monitor Script](https://bestmagiskmodule.github.io/2023/12/19/Ping-Monitor-magical-module.html)

🔍 **Explore, Monitor, and Enjoy the Insights!**

---


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Ping Monitor
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
# Aurthor : revWhiteShadow
# Build Date : 19-12-2023
# Last Modify : Null
# Licence : GPL V3
[url=https://t.me/godTspeed] Telegram]
---
🚀 **PING MONITOR BY @revWhiteShadow** 🚀

---

👋 **Hello, Linux Enthusiasts!**

Are you curious about the performance of your network connection? Want a quick and colorful way to monitor your ping? Look no further! I present to you the **PING MONITOR** script, crafted by the talented @revWhiteShadow.

📝 **Usage Instructions:**

1. **Download the Script:**
- Clone or download the script from the repository.

2. **Set Permissions:**
- Make the script executable using the following command:
```
chmod +x pm
```

3. **Run the Script:**
- Execute the script using the following command:
```
./pm
```

4. **Enjoy the Colorful Output:**
- The script will perform 15 ping tests to google.com and display the results with colorful status indicators.

5. **Desktop Notifications:**
- Desktop notifications will keep you informed of the overall ping status and individual ping results.

6. **Customization (Optional):**
- Feel free to customize the script according to your preferences, adjust color codes, or modify the ping target.

7. **Stay Notified:**
- The script utilizes `notify-send` for desktop notifications, keeping you informed about the overall and individual ping statuses.

🌐 **Compatibility:**
- The script is designed for Linux environments and provides a quick and visual way to assess your network's responsiveness.

🎨 **Color Code Legend:**
- **Red:** Server not responding.
- **Green:** Super fast ping (less than 30ms).
- **Violet:** Moderate ping (30ms - 100ms).
- **Red:** High ping (100ms - 120ms).
- **Red:** Super high ping (more than 120ms).

🔄 **Repeat as Needed:**
- Feel free to run the script as often as you like to monitor changes in your network's performance.

🙏 **Acknowledgments:**
- Special thanks to @revWhiteShadow for the inspiration and guidance in creating this handy ping monitoring script.

🔗 **Repository Link:**
- [Ping Monitor Script](https://bestmagiskmodule.github.io/2023/12/19/Ping-Monitor-magical-module.html)

🔍 **Explore, Monitor, and Enjoy the Insights!**

---

item.title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: simplexchat
item.itunes:summary:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.description:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

eric

It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".

item.title: MATE Random Background [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: MATE Random Background [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]

Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly

Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]

MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]
